summary: Completed testing of HR Dashboard Iteration 4 UI/UX changes. All features working correctly: profile icon dropdown (no Upload Data in top bar), reordered KPI cards, Total Openings popup (not redirect), All Candidates scrollable table, division grouping on Job Openings, JD upload in modal, clickable Analysis metrics, Interviews feedback logic. Backend: 8/8 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified via Playwright.
passed_tests: Top bar has NO Upload Data button (removed as requested)
Top bar has profile icon (data-testid=profile-icon-btn) instead of admin email/logout
Profile icon click opens dropdown with user name, email, and Logout option
Logout button in dropdown works - redirects to login page
Dashboard card order correct: Row 1 has Active Candidates (33), Shortlisted (18), Rejected (26)
Dashboard card order correct: Row 2 has Total Openings (38), Total Candidates (59), Interviews Scheduled (9), Selected (0)
Total Openings KPI card opens popup on same page (not redirect to /dashboard/job-openings)
All other KPI cards (Active, Shortlisted, Rejected, Candidates, Interviews, Selected) open same-page modal popups
Dashboard has Upload Data button (data-testid=dashboard-upload-btn) next to Sync button
All Candidates section shows scrollable table with all 59 candidates (not limited to 10)
Job Openings page groups openings by Division with 12 collapsible sections
Job Openings modal has JD Upload option (data-testid=jd-upload-btn)
Analysis page has 5 clickable metric cards (Shortlist Rate, Interview Rate, Selection Rate, Offer Rate, Overall Conversion)
Analysis page metric cards show popup with detail (e.g., Shortlist Rate 30.5% - 18 shortlisted of 59 total)
Analysis page has drop-off analysis section with clickable cards
Analysis page has cleaner chart colors (soft blue, violet, emerald, red visible in charts)
Analysis vendor table rows are clickable
Interviews page shows 9 interview records with search and L1/L2/All level filters
Interviews page feedback section shows 'No feedback available yet' when neither L1 Feedback nor Remark exists
Backend POST /api/openings/jd?role_name=X accepts file upload and returns success
Backend GET /api/openings/jd?role_name=X returns JD info
Backend /api/analytics/kpis-filtered still works correctly
Backend /api/analytics/roles returns division info for grouping
Backend /api/analytics/interviews returns feedback/remarks fields
Backend /api/candidates returns all candidates (59 total)
Backend /api/analytics/vendors returns vendor performance data
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - existing data from Google Sheets sync (59 candidates, 38 openings across 12 divisions)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 4 UI/UX changes working. Key changes verified: 1) Top bar now has profile icon dropdown instead of admin info/logout - Upload Data moved to dashboard. 2) Dashboard KPI cards reordered (Row 1: Active/Shortlisted/Rejected, Row 2: Openings/Candidates/Interviews/Selected). 3) Total Openings opens popup showing all job openings (not redirect). 4) All Candidates table shows full 59 candidates (scrollable). 5) Job Openings page groups by 12 divisions with collapsible sections. 6) JD Upload button in job opening modal. 7) Analysis page has clickable metrics with popups. 8) Interviews page shows feedback or 'No feedback available yet'. Backend JD endpoints working.

notes.ui_changes_verified: Profile icon dropdown, reordered KPI cards, Total Openings popup, All Candidates table, division grouping, JD upload, clickable Analysis metrics
notes.chart_colors: Analysis page uses cleaner colors: soft blue (#60A5FA), soft violet (#A78BFA), soft red (#F87171), soft emerald (#34D399)
